title: GitHub Copilot adds agent finder so agents can discover the right tools on demand
friendlyTitle: Copilot can now help find the right agent tools
summary: GitHub made agent finder available for Copilot, letting users describe a task and receive ranked matches for MCP servers, skills, canvases, agents and tools. The feature implements the open Agentic Resource Discovery specification and is available across Copilot plans.
friendlySummary: GitHub Copilot can search for useful tools and agents based on what you are trying to do. It recommends matches instead of forcing you to set everything up by hand.
whyItMatters: Tool discovery is becoming a core bottleneck for practical agents: loading every possible tool wastes context, while manual setup does not scale. Agent finder points toward AI systems that can assemble the right capabilities for a job while preserving admin control.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This makes AI coding agents easier to use, especially for teams with many tools and rules.
